function.message: No recorded message from Bix was found in any channel transcript.
function.rulebook_notes: Entity-message lookup requires OUTCOME_NONE_CLARIFICATION when exhaustive search finds no recorded message. Channel logs are authoritative message history source for this task shape.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/bix.md identifies Bix (alias bix). Every transcript under 60_outbox/channels/*.md was read fully; none contains a message authored by Bix/bix or attributed via author_id. Therefore the requested exact last message text does not exist in available records.
